description: Chen lipid panel — all bboxes must be normalized [0,1] with x0<x1 and y0<y1

expectations.bbox_invariant: x0<x1 and y0<y1 for every non-null bbox

what_bug_this_catches: Catches unnormalized bbox coordinates (e.g., pixel values instead of [0,1] fractions). The PDF.js overlay would draw the rectangle in the wrong location or completely off-screen.
